scripts.dev: chcp 65001>nul && concurrently -n vite,tauri -c cyan,green --kill-others-on-fail "npm run frontend:dev" "npm run tauri:dev"
scripts.sidecar: chcp 65001>nul && set PYTHONUTF8=1&& python -X utf8 -m src.api.server
scripts.dev:all: chcp 65001>nul && concurrently -n sidecar,vite,tauri -c yellow,cyan,green --kill-others-on-fail "npm run sidecar" "npm run frontend:dev" "npm run tauri:dev"
